select.where: and id = like CONCAT('%', #{id}, '%') and problem_summary like CONCAT('%', #{problemSummary}, '%'), '%') and problem_description like CONCAT('%', #{problemDescription}, '%'), '%') and audit_time = like CONCAT('%', #{auditTime}, '%') and audit_involved like CONCAT('%', #{auditInvolved}, '%'), '%') and audit_project = like CONCAT('%', #{auditProject}, '%') and audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%') and create_person = like CONCAT('%', #{createPerson}, '%') and create_time = like CONCAT('%', #{createTime}, '%') and update_person = like CONCAT('%', #{updatePerson}, '%') and update_time = like CONCAT('%', #{updateTime}, '%') and isdel =1

mapper.insert:
insert into audit_elements_find_database
problem_summary, problem_description, audit_time, audit_involved, audit_project, audit_model_number, create_person,
create_time, update_person,
update_time, isdel,
like CONCAT('%', #{problemSummary}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{problemDescription}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditTime}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditInvolved}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditProject}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{createPerson}, '%'), NOW(), like CONCAT('%', #{updatePerson}, '%'), NOW(), like CONCAT('%', #{isdel}, '%'),
mapper.update:
UPDATE audit_elements_find_database
problem_summary=like CONCAT('%', #{problemSummary}, '%'), problem_description=like CONCAT('%', #{problemDescription}, '%'), audit_time=like CONCAT('%', #{auditTime}, '%'), audit_involved=like CONCAT('%', #{auditInvolved}, '%'), audit_project=like CONCAT('%', #{auditProject}, '%'), audit_model_number=like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%'), create_person=like CONCAT('%', #{createPerson}, '%'), create_time=like CONCAT('%', #{createTime}, '%'), update_person, update_time=like CONCAT('%', #{updateTime}, '%'), isdel=like CONCAT('%', #{isdel}, '%')
where audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
UPDATE audit_elements_find_database SET isdel=0 where audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
mapper.select: select * from audit_elements_find_database where audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%') AND isdel=1;
mapper.insert:
insert into audit_elements_find_database(id,problem_summary,problem_description,audit_time,audit_involved,audit_project,audit_model_number, create_person,create_time,update_person,update_time,isdel) values
(like CONCAT('%', #{auditFindDataBase.id}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{auditFindDataBase.problemSummary}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditFindDataBase.problemDescription}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{auditFindDataBase.auditTime}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditFindDataBase.auditInvolved}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{auditFindDataBase.auditProject}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditFindDataBase.auditModelNumber}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditFindDataBase.createPerson}, '%'), NOW(), like CONCAT('%', #{auditFindDataBase.updatePerson}, '%'), NOW(),1)
